name: vestaboard-pp-mcp
description: Read and write messages on a Vestaboard split-flap display, with transition control and VBML text formatting.

vestaboard_api_key.title: VESTABOARD_API_KEY
vestaboard_api_key.description: Optional. Sets VESTABOARD_API_KEY for the Vestaboard MCP server. Get a credential from https://web.vestaboard.com.
